base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_atlas_0_9_a_z — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. Text character atlas — digits 0-9 + uppercase letters A-Z. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Text character atlas — digits 0-9 + uppercase letters A-Z; each glyph is 8×8 single NES tile; used across HUD + all in-game text (score / time / world / messages)
